404 N2003_MDCTN_FLW_UP_IND N2003_MDCTN_FLW_UP_IND N2003 Medication Follow-up - The data in this column indicates whether the facility contacted the physician (or physician-designee) by midnight the next calendar day and completed the prescribed/recommended actions in response to the identified potential clinically significant medication issues.
